title: podman centos8 repo  unavailable
body:
Status code: 404 for http://ftp.lysator.liu.se/pub/opensuse/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/CentOS_8/repodata/91e2f0d1b4f5e4dbaaffe33fccfefad47782c4b6537eb36d3487a8456f6f00ae-filelists.xml.gz 

ftp.lysator.liu.se seems not rsync any more.

comments.body:
@lostz thanks for the problem report, however this repository is for the podman.io site which concerns blogs and documentation about Podman.  Any issues that are for Podman itself should be logged against github.com/containers/podman/issues.

That being said, I'm going to guess the @lsm5 might have an insight here.
It looks like the mirror isn't working. Can you try another one?

@lostz I'm able to install podman just fine using the steps mentioned in the install doc. Maybe it's just a case of a bad mirror. Check if a `dnf clean all` followed by the installation steps works for you. If that doesn't work either, I guess it's best to open a bug with the opensuse people.

Closing...
